description: A server for interacting with the Canvas Learning Management System, providing access to courses, modules, assignments, files, and student enrollment data.

tools.name: get_courses
tools.description: Retrieve all available Canvas courses for the current authenticated user.

courses.description: Dictionary mapping course names to their corresponding Canvas course identifiers.

tools.name: get_modules
tools.description: Retrieve all modules within a specific Canvas course.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

modules.description: List of modules within the specified course.

module_id.description: The unique identifier of the module within the course.

name.description: The display name of the module.

status.description: The current status of the module (e.g., locked, unlocked, completed).

tools.name: get_module_items
tools.description: Retrieve all items within a specific module in a Canvas course.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

module_id.description: The unique identifier of the module within the course.

items.description: List of items contained within the specified module.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the module item.

title.description: The display title of the module item.

type.description: The type of content (e.g., File, Page, Assignment, Quiz, ExternalUrl).

url.description: The URL to access or view the module item.

tools.name: get_file_url
tools.description: Get the direct download URL for a file stored in Canvas.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file in Canvas.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

download_url.description: The direct download URL for accessing the file.

tools.name: get_course_assignments
tools.description: Retrieve all assignments for a specific Canvas course, with optional filtering by submission status.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

bucket.description: Optional filter for assignment status. Valid values: past, overdue, undated, ungraded, unsubmitted, upcoming, future.

assignments.description: List of assignments matching the specified criteria.

assignment_id.description: The unique identifier of the assignment.

name.description: The display name of the assignment.

description.description: The detailed description or instructions for the assignment.

due_date.description: The due date and time for the assignment in ISO 8601 format.

submission_status.description: The current submission status (e.g., submitted, not_submitted, graded).

tools.name: get_assignments_by_course_name
tools.description: Retrieve all assignments for a Canvas course using its name rather than ID, supporting partial name matches.

course_name.description: The name of the course as it appears in Canvas. Partial matches are supported.

bucket.description: Optional filter for assignment status. Valid values: past, overdue, undated, ungraded, unsubmitted, upcoming, future.

assignments.description: List of assignments matching the specified criteria.

assignment_id.description: The unique identifier of the assignment.

name.description: The display name of the assignment.

description.description: The detailed description or instructions for the assignment.

due_date.description: The due date and time for the assignment in ISO 8601 format.

submission_status.description: The current submission status (e.g., submitted, not_submitted, graded).

tools.name: get_students_in_course
tools.description: Retrieve all students enrolled in a specific Canvas course.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

students.description: List of students enrolled in the specified course.

student_id.description: The unique identifier of the student in Canvas.

name.description: The full name of the student.

email.description: The email address associated with the student's Canvas account.

enrollment_status.description: The current enrollment status (e.g., active, invited, inactive).

tools.name: get_submission_status
tools.description: Retrieve submission status and grading details for a specific assignment in a Canvas course, optionally filtered by student.

course_id.description: The unique identifier of the Canvas course.

assignment_id.description: The unique identifier of the assignment.

student_id.description: The unique identifier of the student in Canvas. If not provided, returns submission status for all students.

submissions.description: Dictionary mapping student IDs to their submission details. If a specific student_id was provided, contains only that student's submission.

student_id.description: The unique identifier of the student in Canvas.

student_name.description: The full name of the student.

submitted_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was made in ISO 8601 format.

submission_status.description: The current submission status (e.g., submitted, not_submitted, late).

score.description: The numerical score awarded for the submission.

graded_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was graded in ISO 8601 format.

workflow_state.description: The workflow state of the submission (e.g., pending_review, graded, submitted).
